query: What properties in the SOSA ontology connect an Observation to a Sensor? List the property local names.

metadata.description: Requires navigating SOSA ontology structure to find properties with domain Observation and range Sensor (or inverse). Tests rdfs:domain/range reasoning.

query: What is the only owl:DatatypeProperty defined in the SIO ontology? Give its local name.

metadata.description: SIO defines exactly one DatatypeProperty (sio:has-value / SIO_000300). Tests ability to query rdf:type owl:DatatypeProperty in a large ontology. Previous task asked about rdfs:range xsd:float which SIO doesn't declare (it uses owl:someValuesFrom restriction instead).

query: Starting from sio:MeasuredValue, what property leads back to the entity that has the attribute, according to the SIO ontology?

metadata.description: Requires multi-hop reasoning: MeasuredValue is range of has-attribute, has-attribute has inverseOf is-attribute-of. Tests owl:inverseOf + rdfs:range chain.

query: Does the SOSA ontology define any subclasses of sosa:Observation? If so, list them. If not, say 'none'.

metadata.description: Negative test: SOSA does not define subclasses of Observation. Tests whether the agent can confirm absence rather than hallucinate. Requires checking rdfs:subClassOf in /ontology/sosa.
